name: The Initialization Axiom
statement:
i=1 is the initialization of the index variable. It is the first step in the 
    recursive journey from Singularity (n=0) to Integration (n=8).
    
    In computation, all loops must begin somewhere. i=1 is that beginning.
    It is the first iteration of the Universal Recursive Formula.
    
    From i=1, the computation proceeds:
      i=1: S_0 → S_1 (Singularity → First Vibration)
      i=2: S_1 → S_2 (First Vibration → Dark Ages)
      ...
      i=8: S_7 → S_8 (Present Era → Integration)
    
    After 8 iterations, the computation is complete. The Universal Map is fully generated.

computation_trace.description: The complete trace of the Universal Map computation

the_eight_iterations.description: The 8 iterations that generate the Universal Map
the_eight_iterations.summary:
Starting from i=1, the computation performs 8 iterations of the Recursive 
        Binary Operator R̂. Each iteration transforms one epoch state into the next.
        
        After 8 iterations:
          - The complete Universal Map has been generated
          - All 9 epoch states have been computed
          - The Center C has been preserved at every step
          - The Rain of Gold has appeared at the appropriate radii
          - The manifold is fully formed
        
        The computation is complete. The map is live.
